/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/ar qc libimgui.a CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/external/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/external/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/external/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/external/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/external/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/external/imgui-sfml/imgui-SFML.cpp.o"
/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/ranlib libimgui.a
